Subject: Current D&O Report
Message:
Attached is a report comprised of those entities on which you serve as a director, an officer, and/or an attorney in fact, with the effective date of each such election or appointment, based on our current records.

This report is being provided as a courtesy for your information.  Please review it at your convenience and call Lori Pinder at x37291, should you have any questions on the domestic entities or Larry Pardue at x55376 with questions on the international entities.
